report.overview: Today is a packed day balancing product decisions and engineering follow-ups. The team shipped the beta feature yesterday and initial feedback is positive. A few open items on the infra side need resolution before end of week, and two vendor threads require responses. The afternoon is mostly free for focused work on the reorgable PDF iteration.
agenda: 10:00 AM – Q2 roadmap review with product
2:00 PM – Deep work: reorgable PDF template
5:00 PM – EOD sync with remote team

todos.task: Review and merge open PRs before standup
Send Q2 roadmap draft to stakeholders
Update canary deployment config for worker
Reply to vendor contract email from Tuesday
Add retry logic to ingest worker error handling
Review analytics dashboard numbers with PM
Push docs update for API v2 endpoints
Update reorgable README with preview instructions

followUps: Email Alex re: licensing terms on the new SDK
Follow up with ops team on PagerDuty alert threshold ticket
Ask Jordan about the Figma component library migration timeline
